mapper.sql: select id, employee_id, employee_name, wage_month, total_process_count, total_ok_qty, total_defect_qty, should_wage, deduct_wage, actual_wage, status, audit_by_id, audit_by_name, audit_time, pay_time, settle_status, report_log_id, cost_amount, confirm_by, confirm_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from t_erp_piece_wage
mapper.insert: insert into t_erp_piece_wage ( employee_id, employee_name, wage_month, total_process_count, total_ok_qty, total_defect_qty, should_wage, deduct_wage, actual_wage, status, audit_by_id, audit_by_name, audit_time, pay_time, settle_status, report_log_id, cost_amount, confirm_by, confirm_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{wageMonth}, #{totalProcessCount}, #{totalOkQty}, #{totalDefectQty}, #{shouldWage}, #{deductWage}, #{actualWage}, #{status}, #{auditById}, #{auditByName}, #{auditTime}, #{payTime}, #{settleStatus}, #{reportLogId}, #{costAmount}, #{confirmBy}, #{confirmTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.delete:
delete from t_erp_piece_wage where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT l.employee_id AS employee_id, l.employee_name AS employee_name, l.process_id AS process_id, p.process_name AS process_name, l.job_id AS job_id, SUM(COALESCE(l.completed_qty, 0)) AS total_ok_qty, SUM(COALESCE(l.defect_qty, 0)) AS total_defect_qty, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN l.completed_qty > 0 THEN jp.unit_price END), 0) AS unit_price, SUM(COALESCE(l.completed_qty, 0) * COALESCE(jp.unit_price, 0)) AS should_wage FROM t_erp_produce_report_log l LEFT JOIN t_erp_process_def p ON l.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_erp_produce_job_process jps ON l.job_process_id = jps.id LEFT JOIN t_erp_process_def jp ON jp.id = l.process_id WHERE l.del_flag = '0' AND l.validation_status = 'PASS' AND l.employee_id IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(l.event_time, '%Y-%m') = #{wageMonth} AND (jps.piece_wage_applicable IS NULL OR jps.piece_wage_applicable != '0') GROUP BY l.employee_id, l.employee_name, l.process_id, p.process_name, l.job_id HAVING SUM(COALESCE(l.completed_qty, 0)) > 0 ORDER BY l.employee_id, l.process_id, l.job_id
